Operations Banquet Menus Logistics Log Mooncake

Chef Cheng Koung Meng

With 60 years of experience, CKM is a trusted catering team in Phnom Penh, specializing in traditional Khmer weddings, Chinese banquets, and various gatherings.

We provide catering services for weddings and gatherings. With our extensive experience, we aim to handle the preparations so you can relax and enjoy the event with your guests.

Call Us Consultation
60+ Years of Experience
10k+ Clients Served
Reliable Consistent Quality
Clean Hygiene Standard

Our Core Services

We aim to ease your event planning stress with our practical services.

Khmer Wedding Catering & Setup

We assist with traditional Khmer wedding menus and provide tent rental and venue setup, helping to reduce your preparation workload.

Chinese Banquets & Corporate Events

For family gatherings, traditional festivals, or corporate dinners, we prepare classic dishes suitable for hosting your guests.

Beverage Services & Event Coordination

We have dedicated staff for beverage service and power setup. In case of unexpected weather or issues, we will do our best to find a quick solution.

Our Commitment

We work honestly and treat every guest with care.

Consistent Taste

We prepare our food carefully to ensure the taste remains consistent across all events, regardless of size.

Timely Serving

We understand the importance of your schedule. We strive to serve food on time and hot, so your guests don't have to wait.

Safety and Hygiene

From ingredient preparation to cooking and cleaning, we follow proper hygiene practices to provide a safe dining experience.

Our Dishes & Events

Real photos from events organized by the CKM team

Quiet Morning Blessing and Alms Setup

Morning religious ceremonies require peace. When you wake up, the alms for the monks are already perfectly arranged.

Silent Catering for Business and Corporate Guests

When hosting corporate guests, elegance is key. We serve silently so you can focus entirely on your business discussions.
